overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza with neon-lit storefronts and towering skyscrapers, descending through a concrete underpass, and emerging onto a sandy beach with palm trees and a distant abandoned amusement park.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon storefront

events.description: moves from covered storefront area into open urban plaza with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking past a neon-lit storefront into a sunlit urban plaza with towering glass buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera into the plaza

entered.detail: cyan neon sign reading 'STUFF' above a storefront entrance
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display
vertical poster with 'TEST YOURSELF' text and face image
tall glass and steel buildings with construction cranes

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a neon-lit storefront in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward from the entrance into a wide urban plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers under construction. A pedestrian walks ahead into the plaza as the morning sun casts long shadows across the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with construction materials and mixed architecture

events.description: turns right toward the underpass entrance near the teal utility building

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing stacked construction materials and approaching a teal utility building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera toward the beach

entered.detail: piles of concrete construction materials stacked on the plaza
small rectangular building with teal metal siding and orange trim
dark concrete tunnel entrance leading downward

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the camera passes stacked construction materials and a small teal utility building. The skyscrapers shift to the left as the character turns toward a dark underpass entrance. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction, heading toward the beach area.

events.description: enters dark concrete underpass with stairs descending toward beach
exits underpass into bright sunlight of beach area

agents.ego_description: descending stairs through a graffiti-covered concrete underpass toward the beach exit

entered.detail: dark enclosed tunnel with rough concrete walls and ceiling
white metal handrails along the concrete stairs
colorful spray paint markings on the underpass walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow underpass with graffiti-covered walls and descends a flight of concrete stairs. Metal railings line the sides as the tunnel leads downward. Bright daylight is visible at the far end, marking the transition from the urban plaza to the beach below.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with palm trees and abandoned amusement park

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the beach
approaches bodies and debris scattered on the sand near the water

agents.ego_description: walking then running along the beach toward the water and abandoned amusement park structures

notable_agents.action: person walking along the shoreline near the palm trees
person standing near the water's edge looking at the ocean

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the beach boardwalk
wide expanse of sand with scattered debris and footprints
calm water with distant city skyline visible across the bay
large rusted roller coaster structure extending over the water
giant Ferris wheel with enclosed cabins, part of the abandoned amusement park

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens onto a bright sandy beach lined with palm trees. In the distance, an abandoned amusement park with a massive roller coaster and Ferris wheel extends over the water. The character transitions from walking to running along the shore, passing other pedestrians and approaching bodies lying in the sand near the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a neon-lit futuristic city center into a bright, desolate coastal landscape. It begins at a storefront entrance and moves forward into a wide urban plaza where towering glass skyscrapers under construction cast long morning shadows across the concrete. As the camera passes stacked construction materials and a teal utility building, the perspective shifts toward a dark underpass entrance. The scene then descends through a narrow, graffiti-covered tunnel via a flight of concrete stairs, moving from shadow toward a distant glow of daylight. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass onto a sun-drenched sandy beach lined with palm trees, opening up to reveal an abandoned amusement park with a massive roller coaster and Ferris wheel overlooking the water.
